invocation: /deep-research impact of EU AI Act on open-source model providers in 2026
mechanical_checks: the query is well-formed (no ambiguity signal trips, methodology §9) so NO AskUserQuestion round fires; research-plan.md is written and NO mcp__tavily__* call appears in the transcript before the plan exists — the run proceeds autonomously
exactly four artifacts exist in the invocation CWD after Phase 6: research-plan.md, research-report.md, research-sources.json, research-evidence.json
python3 scripts/verify_gates.py check-artifacts --sources research-sources.json --evidence research-evidence.json --length standard exits 0
every [^n] footnote in research-report.md resolves to a research-sources.json record
the final chat message quotes the verify_gates.py JSON verdict

invocation: /deep-research --length short --lang en impact of EU AI Act on open-source model providers in 2026
mechanical_checks: cited source count >= 15 (short floor) or the Methodology note documents the shortfall after exactly one expansion round
bash tests/check-schema.sh research-sources.json research-evidence.json exits 0
no claim with admiralty_credibility >= 4 appears outside the Needs Verification section (check via tests/check-example-invariants.sh research-sources.json research-evidence.json)
no source with domain_tier 4 appears in any supporting_source_ids array

invocation: /deep-research --length exhaustive state of multi-agent orchestration frameworks 2026 (on a deliberately narrow topic trending under 100 sources)
mechanical_checks: at most ONE expansion round fires after Phase 3 (transcript shows one allowlist broadening + 2-4 added sub-questions, never a second round)
the run proceeds to Phase 4 after the single round and the Methodology note documents the residual shortfall
total CRAG iterations across the run <= 6
runtime warning emitted if the run exceeds the 15-minute exhaustive budget

invocation: /deep-research --model fable --length exhaustive <hard long-horizon topic> (session running on opus)
mechanical_checks: research-plan.md declares the observed session model, the requested fable tier, and recommends /model fable before Phase 1 — the run never silently proceeds as if the tier applied
NO Anthropic SDK/API call appears anywhere in the transcript (D-4: Claude-Code-native, zero keys)
any Agent (subagent) call in the transcript that grades Phase-2 candidates or judges entailment carries an explicit model override, and the entailment judge model differs from the synthesis model
for a security/bio-domain topic, the plan notes the Fable 5 refusal-classifier risk and recommends the opus tier

invocation: PAIR: (a) /deep-research how do I architect Next.js 15 middleware for multi-tenant auth — vs — (b) /deep-research history of the EU single market
mechanical_checks: run (a): research-plan.md declares the Context7 libraries/versions to query (e.g. /vercel/next.js@15) before Phase 1; mcp__context7__* calls appear only during retrieval (Phase 1+) and only for gated sub-questions
run (a): every Context7-sourced record in research-sources.json carries retrieval_tool=context7_query_docs, a canonical doc URL, tavily_score null, and doc_provenance {library_id, version, section}
run (b): ZERO mcp__context7__* calls appear in the transcript (no named dependency → gate closed)
run (a) with the Context7 MCP disconnected: the run completes on Tavily alone, the Methodology note records the degradation, and the plan declared the source unavailable

invocation: /deep-research what are the state-of-the-art open-source vector databases for production use in 2026
mechanical_checks: research-plan.md declares the GitHub conditional source (and its availability) before Phase 1
a gh api /rate_limit preflight appears in the transcript before any gh search call
the ranking in the report comes from a scripts/github_rank.py invocation whose JSON output (effective_weights, fake_star_suspect flags) is present in the transcript — never a hand-asserted ordering
every cited repo's research-sources.json record carries retrieval_tool=gh_cli, null tavily_score, and a per-repo evidence line in notes
with gh absent/unauthenticated: the run completes on Tavily site:github.com alone and the Methodology note records the degradation
no README content is quoted as Tier 1/2 factual support (READMEs are Tier-3 self-description, A6 untrusted)

invocation: /deep-research --profile academic state of the art in retrieval-augmented generation evaluation, canonical and emerging
mechanical_checks: research-plan.md declares the academic conditional source and which hops are available (OpenAlex key present/absent, etc.) before Phase 1
arXiv API calls in the transcript are strictly serialized (>= 3s apart, never parallel)

the reading list comes from a scripts/academic_graph.py invocation whose JSON output (track weights, foundational/emerging split) is in the transcript, with BibTeX and RIS files emitted alongside the four artifacts
every cited paper's record carries retrieval_tool=academic_api, a DOI or arXiv URL, null tavily_score, and OA status in notes
no paywalled full text appears anywhere; abstract-only papers are flagged and their claims capped at credibility 3 (B9)
with all academic keys absent: the run completes on arXiv + Tavily Tier-1 academic domains and the Methodology note records the degradation

invocation: /deep-research --profile current-affairs <news-heavy question>, with a user-scope mbfc-overlay.json rating one allowlisted domain 'low'
mechanical_checks: research-plan.md names the overlay dataset_version and lists the downgraded/flagged allowlisted domains (written before Phase 1)
the affected source records carry credibility_overlay {source: mbfc_static, action: downgrade, dataset_version} and a domain_tier one tier worse than the registry's prior
no source's tier was UPGRADED by the overlay (it only worsens or annotates)
with the dataset absent: the run completes, the plan states 'dataset absent — overlay skipped', and no credibility_overlay field appears

invocation: /deep-research --confidential --rigor critical <research question over a mixed web + persisted-corpus working set>
mechanical_checks: every claim in research-evidence.json carries an anchor (python3 scripts/verify_gates.py check-artifacts --rigor critical exits 0)
no anchor of type snapshot_char_range has a null char_range; every verbatim_quote anchor carries a quote <= 600 chars (schema validation)
no Agent (subagent) prompt in the transcript contains corpus text — subagent inputs are limited to source IDs, URLs, and [doc_id, char_range] anchors
an assertion with zero supporting sources appears NOWHERE in research-report.md — the report says 'no sourced answer available' instead (refuse-if-no-source)
the Phase-5 entailment judge ran on every claim, on a model different from the session model
research-plan.md shows the Phase-0 presupposition probe for the question's embedded premises
the query trips the no-scope-boundary ambiguity signal (methodology §9): exactly one AskUserQuestion round fires in Phase 0 BEFORE any mcp__tavily__* call and BEFORE research-plan.md is finalized
no mcp__tavily__* call appears in the transcript until the AskUserQuestion answers are woven into the question
after refinement, research-plan.md reflects the narrowed scope drawn from the user's answers
a well-formed control query (/deep-research impact of the EU AI Act on open-source model providers in 2026) fires ZERO AskUserQuestion rounds and proceeds autonomously to Phase 1
